title: Painted Ponies
writer: Frank S. Beresford, John Harold Hamlin, Tom Reed
actors: Hoot Gibson, William R. Dunn, Charles Sellon
plot: A rodeo rider arrives in Toptown to compete in the local rodeo. He meets a pretty young girl who, with her crippled father, runs a merry-go-round for the town's children. The town bully, who has designs on the young girl, tries to...
